nodes.node_description: Configure the product catalogue — visibility, card layout, search, filters, UOM, and product tags

config.label: Show PTR
config.description: Display Price to Retailer on the product card

advanced_config.label: Show MRP
advanced_config.description: Display Maximum Retail Price on the product card

advanced_config.label: Show Margin %
advanced_config.description: Display calculated margin percentage on the product card

advanced_config.label: Show SKU Code
advanced_config.description: Display the SKU code on the product card

advanced_config.label: Show Stock
advanced_config.description: Display available stock count on the product card

advanced_config.label: Show Piece Size
advanced_config.description: Display the piece size / pack size on the product card

config.label: Ordering Mode
config.description: How reps add products — one unit at a time or piece and case together

advanced_config.label: Piece Unit Label
advanced_config.description: Button label for piece ordering (e.g. Piece, Pcs, Unit)

advanced_config.label: Case Unit Label
advanced_config.description: Button label for case ordering (e.g. Case, Ctn, Box)

advanced_config.label: Other Unit Label
advanced_config.description: Button label for the third ordering unit (e.g. Other, Strip)

advanced_config.label: Max Digits — Piece
advanced_config.description: Maximum digits allowed when entering piece quantity (1–6)

advanced_config.label: Max Digits — Case
advanced_config.description: Maximum digits allowed when entering case quantity (1–6)

config.label: Enable Product Search
config.description: Allow reps to search for products by name, SKU, brand, or variant

advanced_config.label: Search Debounce (ms)
advanced_config.description: Delay in milliseconds before search fires after the user stops typing

advanced_config.label: Fuzzy Match Threshold
advanced_config.description: How closely a result must match the query (0 = exact, 1 = anything)

advanced_config.label: Min Query Length
advanced_config.description: Minimum characters required before search triggers
